name: cotizador-backend
description: Backend para procesamiento de Excel con generación automática de fórmulas

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='../frontend/build';const dest='public';if(fs.existsSync(dest))fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to public/');"
